text: A pizza is cut into 10 equal slices. Sam eats 3 slices. What fraction of the pizza has Sam eaten? Give your answer in its simplest form.
generatorSolution: Sam eats 3 slices out of 10 equal slices, so the fraction eaten is 3/10. To check if this can be simplified, we look for common factors of 3 and 10. The factors of 3 are 1 and 3. The factors of 10 are 1, 2, 5, and 10. The only common factor is 1, so 3/10 is already in its simplest form. The answer is 3/10.
